semantic.role: 项目概览与开发者指南
responsibilities: 项目核心概念与目标说明
技术栈与构建命令概览
代码规范与架构分层描述
Git 工作流与提交纪律定义
关键约束与维护边界说明
outOfScope: 详细的 API 文档、用户手册及设计原理文档（位于独立的 docs 子目录）

English.purpose: This document serves as the central README and developer onboarding guide for the ArchSpine project. It explains why ArchSpine exists, what it does, and how to contribute effectively.
English.context_and_audience: Primary audience is developers who work on the ArchSpine toolchain itself, including AI agents that need to understand repository structure, build processes, and governance rules. Secondary audience includes contributors exploring the codebase.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine is an open-source protocol and toolchain that builds a .spine/ control plane inside Git repositories for AI-era architectural governance.
The .spine/ directory contains both human-reviewed (config.json, rules/) and auto-generated files (index/, atlas/, view/).
Commit discipline is strict: source changes and .spine/ sync must be committed in separate commits; never mix them.
Bilingual documentation (English + Simplified Chinese) must stay aligned.
Never directly modify generated .spine/ sub-trees; use `spine sync` to refresh them.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是 ArchSpine 项目的核心 README 和开发者入门指南，阐述项目存在的原因、功能以及如何有效参与贡献。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 主要面向 ArchSpine 工具链本身的开发者，包括需要理解仓库结构、构建流程和治理规则的 AI 智能体；其次面向希望探索代码库的贡献者。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine 是一个开源协议与工具链，通过在 Git 仓库内构建 .spine/ 控制面，实现面向 AI 时代的架构治理与语义层。
.spine/ 目录包含人工审查的文件（config.json、rules/）以及自动生成的文件（index/、atlas/、view/）。
严格的提交纪律：源码变更与 .spine/ 同步必须分两次提交，不得混入同一次提交。
中英文双语文档必须保持内容对齐。
禁止直接编辑自动生成的 .spine/ 子目录，应使用 `spine sync` 命令刷新。
